blended.narrative: Tuckerman Ravine is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 9 inches of dry powder expected. Snow levels around 416 ft. Looking ahead, 39 inches possible over the next 14 days. Strong winds with gusts to 56 mph may cause lift holds.

Tomorrow: 2.4" of snow, highs of 20°F, gusts to 60 mph. Expect powder.
Monday: 5" of snow, highs of 38°F, gusts to 45 mph. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 1.8" of snow, highs of 44°F, gusts to 61 mph.
Wednesday: dry, highs of 13°F, gusts to 60 mph.
Sunday: 24" of heavy snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder. Models disagree — check back.
